title_zh: 基于NestJS+Flutter的智学云课在线教育平台设计与实现
title_en: Design and Implementation of ZhiXue Cloud Course Online Education Platform Based on NestJS and Flutter
name: 付凯文
abstract_zh: 高校日常教学对班级签到、课后答疑、视频回放等功能有实际需要，但多数MOOC平台把重心放在证书发放和学分互认上，班级维度的管理功能往往缺位。本文围绕这一空缺，开发了智学云课在线教育平台。后端API用NestJS编写，按Module拆分为认证、课程、社区、问答、班级、管理六个独立模块，数据库操作由TypeORM完成。移动端用Flutter编写一套代码，编译后同时在Android和iOS上运行。管理端用Vue 3搭配Element Plus组件库，在浏览器中完成课程审核、用户管理和数据查看。身份认证走JWT双令牌机制，Access Token 30分钟过期，Refresh Token 7天轮转。功能测试覆盖用户、课程、社区、问答、管理端五个模块共32条用例，通过率100%。用JMeter对登录、课程列表、课程详情、进度上报、帖子发布五个接口做压力测试，100并发条件下平均响应时间均在200ms以内，吞吐量152 TPS，错误率0.3%。
keywords_zh: 在线教育；NestJS；Flutter；跨平台开发；系统设计与实现
abstract_en: Daily university teaching requires class attendance tracking, after-class Q&A, and video playback, yet most MOOC platforms prioritize certificate issuance and credit transfer, leaving class-level management largely unsupported. This paper fills that gap with the ZhiXue Cloud Course platform. The backend API is written in NestJS and split into six independent modules: authentication, courses, community, Q&A, classes, and administration. Database operations are handled by TypeORM. The mobile client is written in Flutter, compiled from a single codebase to run on both Android and iOS. The admin panel uses Vue 3 with Element Plus for course review, user management, and data viewing in the browser. Authentication uses a dual JWT token scheme: Access Tokens expire in 30 minutes while Refresh Tokens rotate every 7 days. Functional testing covers 32 test cases across five modules with a 100% pass rate. JMeter stress tests on five core APIs show average response times under 200ms at 100 concurrent users, with throughput at 152 TPS and an error rate of 0.3%.
keywords_en: Online education;NestJS;Flutter;Cross-platform development;System design and implementation
acknowledgement: 论文写到这里，最想感谢的是我的导师。从选题方向的确认到系统每一次迭代的代码审查，导师都给出了具体的修改意见，帮我少走了很多弯路。学院四年里教过我课的老师们，课上讲的内容在做这个项目的时候多次用到，这里一并致谢。实验室几位同学帮忙做了移动端的兼容性测试，也帮我发现了好几个边界条件的bug。最后谢谢我的家人，他们一直在背后支持我，让我能安心写完论文。
